appDesc.message: Inodzosera YouTube kune yayo yakasarudzika dhizaini (pamberi pemakona ese akakomberedzwa & akavanzika asingadi) + inodzoreredza YouTube Shorts + inodzivirira thumbnail kushambadza

helptip_restoreDislikes.message: Ratidza kusafarira kuverenga uchishandisa Return YouTube Dislike data

helptip_disableShorts.message: Dzorera Shorts kune classic wide player

helptip_shortsBlock.message: Hide Shorts kubva pakuonekwa mumusha peji + migumisiro

helptip_playablesBlock.message: Hide Playables kubva kuonekwa mumusha peji

helptip_adBlock.message: Kuvanza ad thumbnails kubva Homepage layouts

helptip_aiBlock.message: Kuvanza AI zvinhu kubva kumba + mavhidhiyo mapeji
